tables.name: kit_custom_value
tables.comment: contiene i valori dei campi custom definiti per la categoria

triggers.name: trg_validate_discount
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER trg_validate_discount BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON products.kit_customer_group FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION products.validate_discount_kit_customer_group()

views.name: v_kit_customer_group
views.definition:
SELECT kcg.kit_id,
    kcg.group_id,
    customer_group.name,
    customer_group.is_partner,
    kcg.sellable
   FROM (products.kit_customer_group kcg
     JOIN customers.customer_group ON ((kcg.group_id = customer_group.id)));

views.name: v_kit_extended
views.definition:
SELECT kit.id,
    kit.internal_name,
    kit.main_product_code,
    kit.is_main_prd_sellable,
    kit.is_active,
    common.get_translations(kit.translation_uuid) AS translation,
    kit.initial_subscription_months,
    kit.next_subscription_months,
    kit.activation_time_days,
    kit.billing_period,
    json_build_object('nrc', kit.nrc, 'mrc', kit.mrc) AS base_price,
    pc.name AS category,
    pc.id AS category_id,
    products.related_product_get_by_kit_id(kit.id) AS related_products,
    products.get_kit_customer_group(kit.id, true) AS sellable_to_customer_groups,
    ( SELECT json_agg(x.*) AS json_agg
           FROM ( SELECT kit_custom_value.key_name,
                    kit_custom_value.value
                   FROM products.kit_custom_value
                  WHERE (kit_custom_value.kit_id = kit.id)) x) AS custom_fields,
    kit.bundle_prefix,
    kit.ecommerce
   FROM (products.kit
     JOIN products.product_category pc ON ((pc.id = kit.category_id)));

views.name: v_timoo_indiretta_test
views.definition:
SELECT key_label,
    customer_id,
    user_month,
    se_month
   FROM ( SELECT custom_items.key_label,
            custom_items.customer_id,
            (custom_items.prices ->> 'user_month'::text) AS user_month,
            (custom_items.prices ->> 'se_month'::text) AS se_month
           FROM products.custom_items
          WHERE (((custom_items.key_label)::text = 'timoo_indiretta'::text) AND (custom_items.customer_id = 110))
        UNION
         SELECT custom_items.key_label,
            custom_items.customer_id,
            (custom_items.prices ->> 'user_month'::text) AS user_month,
            (custom_items.prices ->> 'se_month'::text)
           FROM products.custom_items
          WHERE (((custom_items.key_label)::text = 'timoo_indiretta'::text) AND (custom_items.customer_id = '-1'::integer))) prezzi
 LIMIT 1;

functions.name: clone_kit
create_kit
discount_get_for_kit
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.discount_get_for_kit(_kit_id bigint, _customer_group_ids bigint[])
 RETURNS TABLE(discount_nrc numeric, int_rounding_nrc boolean, group_id_nrc bigint, discount_mrc numeric, int_rounding_mrc boolean, group_id_mrc bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _is_inflation_nrc boolean;
    _discount_nrc numeric;
    _integer_rounding_nrc boolean;
    _group_id_nrc bigint;

    _is_inflation_mrc boolean;
    _discount_mrc numeric;
    _integer_rounding_mrc boolean;
    _group_id_mrc bigint;
BEGIN

    --
    -- NRC
    --

    -- check if inflation or discount
    SELECT max(kcg.discount_nrc) > 0
    FROM products.kit_customer_group kcg
    WHERE kcg.group_id = ANY(_customer_group_ids) AND
        kcg.kit_id = _kit_id INTO _is_inflation_nrc;

    -- select appropriate adjustment and its use_int_rounding flag
    IF _is_inflation_nrc THEN

        SELECT kcg.group_id, kcg.discount_nrc, kcg.use_int_rounding
            FROM products.kit_customer_group kcg
            WHERE kcg.group_id = ANY(_customer_group_ids)
              AND kcg.kit_id = _kit_id
            ORDER BY kcg.discount_nrc DESC -- order by DESC => the higher first
            LIMIT 1
            INTO _group_id_nrc, _discount_nrc, _integer_rounding_nrc
        ;
    ELSE

        SELECT kcg.group_id, kcg.discount_nrc, kcg.use_int_rounding
            FROM products.kit_customer_group kcg
            WHERE kcg.group_id = ANY(_customer_group_ids)
              AND kcg.kit_id = _kit_id
            ORDER BY kcg.discount_nrc ASC -- order by ASC => the lower first
            LIMIT 1
            INTO _group_id_nrc, _discount_nrc, _integer_rounding_nrc
        ;
    END IF;

    --
    -- MRC
    --

    -- check if inflation or discount
    SELECT max(kcg.discount_mrc) > 0
    FROM products.kit_customer_group kcg
    WHERE kcg.group_id = ANY(_customer_group_ids) AND
        kcg.kit_id = _kit_id INTO _is_inflation_mrc;

    -- select appropriate adjustment and its use_int_rounding flag
    IF _is_inflation_mrc THEN

        SELECT kcg.group_id, kcg.discount_mrc, kcg.use_int_rounding
        FROM products.kit_customer_group kcg
        WHERE kcg.group_id = ANY(_customer_group_ids)
          AND kcg.kit_id = _kit_id
        ORDER BY kcg.discount_mrc DESC -- order by DESC => the higher first
        LIMIT 1
        INTO _group_id_mrc, _discount_mrc, _integer_rounding_mrc
        ;
    ELSE

        SELECT kcg.group_id, kcg.discount_mrc, kcg.use_int_rounding
        FROM products.kit_customer_group kcg
        WHERE kcg.group_id = ANY(_customer_group_ids)
          AND kcg.kit_id = _kit_id
        ORDER BY kcg.discount_mrc ASC -- order by ASC => the lower first
        LIMIT 1
        INTO _group_id_mrc, _discount_mrc, _integer_rounding_mrc
        ;
    END IF;

    RETURN QUERY (
        SELECT
            _discount_nrc as discount_nrc,
            _integer_rounding_nrc as integer_rounding_nrc,
            _group_id_nrc as group_id_nrc,
            _discount_mrc as discount_mrc,
            _integer_rounding_mrc as int_rounding_mrc,
            _group_id_mrc as group_id_mrc

    );

end;
$function$

functions.name: get_all_kit
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_all_kit()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
 set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista dei campi custom
select json_agg(x) from (
select * from products.v_kit_extended
    ) x;

$function$

functions.name: get_all_kit_ecommerce
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_all_kit_ecommerce()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista dei campi custom
    select json_agg(x) 
from (
    select 
        v.*, 
        k.bundle_prefix
    from products.v_kit_extended v
    join products.kit k 
        ON v.id = k.id
    where k.ecommerce = true
) x;

    $function$

functions.name: get_kit_by_id
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_by_id(search_kit bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
    -- restituisco il primo oggetto
    select json_agg(x) -> 0
    from (select kit.*, k.billing_period
          from products.v_kit_extended kit join products.kit k using (id)
          where kit.id = search_kit) x;

$function$

functions.name: get_kit_by_id_ecommerce
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_by_id_ecommerce(search_kit bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisco il primo oggetto
select json_agg(x) -> 0
from (select kit.*, k.billing_period, k.bundle_prefix
      from products.v_kit_extended kit join products.kit k using (id)
      where kit.id = search_kit and k.ecommerce = true) x;

$function$

functions.name: get_kit_custom_fields
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_custom_fields(search_kit bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
 set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista dei campi custom
select json_agg(x) from (
select key_name, value from products.kit_custom_value
    where kit_id = search_kit
    ) x;

$function$

functions.name: get_kit_customer_group
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_customer_group(search_kit bigint, only_sellable boolean)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
 set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista dei profili collegati a questo kit, con l'indicazione se i kit è vendibile o no
select json_agg(x) from (
select group_id, name, is_partner from products.v_kit_customer_group
    where kit_id = search_kit and (only_sellable = false or sellable = true)
    ) x;

$function$

functions.name: get_kit_customer_group
get_kit_filtered
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_filtered(p_category_id integer, p_customer_group_id integer)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista di tutti i kit filtrati per categoria
    select json_agg(x) from (
                                select * from products.v_kit_extended
                                where id in (select id from products.kit join products.kit_customer_group kcg on kit.id = kcg.kit_id
                                             where (p_category_id is null or kit.category_id = p_category_id) and
                                                   ( p_customer_group_id is null or kcg.group_id = p_customer_group_id)
                                )
                            ) x;

    $function$

functions.name: get_kit_filtered_ecommerce
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_filtered_ecommerce(p_category_id integer, p_customer_group_id integer)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista di tutti i kit filtrati per categoria
    select json_agg(x) from (
        select vkit.*, k.bundle_prefix from products.v_kit_extended vkit
		join products.kit k on vkit.id = k.id
        where vkit.id in (select id from products.kit join products.kit_customer_group kcg on kit.id = kcg.kit_id
                     where (p_category_id is null or kit.category_id = p_category_id) and
                         ( p_customer_group_id is null or kcg.group_id = p_customer_group_id) and kit.ecommerce = true
        )
    ) x;

    $function$

functions.name: get_kit_related_product
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_kit_related_product(search_kit bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
    select json_agg(x) from (

                                select coalesce(nullif(kp.group_name,''), p.internal_name) as group_name,
                                       kp.required as required,
                                       json_agg(
                                               json_build_object(
                                                       'name', p.internal_name ,
                                                       'id', p.code ,
                                                       'min_qty', kp.minimum ,
                                                       'max_qty' , kp.maximum ,
                                                       'price' , json_build_object( 'nrc', kp.nrc , 'mrc', kp.mrc  ),
                                                       'translation', common.get_translations(p.translation_uuid),
                                                       'image_url', p.img_url,
                                                       'custom_fields', products.get_product_custom_fields(p.code)
                                               )
                                       ) as products

                                from products.kit_product kp join products.product p on kp.product_code = p.code

                                where kp.kit_id = search_kit
                                group by 1,2
                            ) x;
$function$

functions.name: get_product_categories

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_product_categories()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql

$function$

functions.name: get_product_custom_fields
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.get_product_custom_fields(input_product_code character varying)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
 set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista dei campi custom
select json_agg(x) from (
select key_name, value from products.product_custom_value
    where product_code = input_product_code
    ) x;

$function$

functions.name: kit_discount_get_filtered
kit_discount_update
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.kit_discount_update(_kit_discount json)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    IF EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM products.kit_customer_group WHERE group_id = (_kit_discount->>'group_id')::bigint AND kit_id = (_kit_discount->>'kit_id')::bigint)
    THEN

        RAISE NOTICE 'EXISTS';

        -- already exists -> update
        UPDATE products.kit_customer_group SET
            sellable = (_kit_discount->>'sellable')::boolean,
            discount_nrc = (_kit_discount->>'discount_nrc')::numeric(6,3),
            discount_mrc = (_kit_discount->>'discount_mrc')::numeric(6,3),
            use_int_rounding = (_kit_discount->>'use_int_rounding')::boolean
        WHERE
            group_id = (_kit_discount->>'group_id')::bigint AND
            kit_id = (_kit_discount->>'kit_id')::bigint;
    ELSE

        -- not exists -> create
        INSERT INTO products.kit_customer_group (kit_id, group_id, sellable, discount_nrc, discount_mrc, use_int_rounding) VALUES (
            (_kit_discount->>'kit_id')::bigint,
            (_kit_discount->>'group_id')::bigint,
            (_kit_discount->>'sellable')::boolean,
            (_kit_discount->>'discount_nrc')::numeric(6,3),
            (_kit_discount->>'discount_mrc')::numeric(6,3),
            (_kit_discount->>'use_int_rounding')::boolean
        );
    END IF;

END;
$function$

functions.name: kit_get_by_id
kit_get_by_id_customer
kit_get_filtered
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.kit_get_filtered(_category_id integer, _cg_id bigint, _net_commercial_profile_id bigint[], _only_ecommerce boolean)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT json_agg(x)
    FROM (
        SELECT *
        FROM products.v_kit_extended
        WHERE (_category_id is null or category_id = _category_id) AND
            (
                _net_commercial_profile_id is null OR
                EXISTS(
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM json_array_elements(custom_fields) AS elem
                    WHERE elem->>'key_name' = 'commercial_profile_id'
                      AND (elem->'value'->>'id')::bigint = ANY(_net_commercial_profile_id)
                )
            ) AND
            -- only if flag is true apply filter, (filter = false) != (ecommerce = false)
            (_only_ecommerce IS NULL OR _only_ecommerce IS FALSE OR ecommerce = true) AND
            (
                _cg_id is null OR
                EXISTS(
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM json_array_elements(sellable_to_customer_groups) AS _cg
                    WHERE (_cg->>'group_id')::bigint = _cg_id
                )
            )
    )x;

$function$

functions.name: kit_get_filtered_customer
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.kit_get_filtered_customer(_category_id integer, _customer_id bigint, _net_commercial_profile_id bigint[], _only_ecommerce boolean)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _cg_id bigint[];
BEGIN

    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers.customer WHERE id = _customer_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No customer with id % found', _customer_id USING ERRCODE = 'T1BZ0';
    END IF;

    SELECT array(
                   SELECT group_id FROM customers.customer WHERE id = _customer_id
                   UNION
                   SELECT group_id FROM customers.group_association WHERE customer_id = _customer_id
           ) INTO _cg_id;

    RETURN json_agg(x)
        FROM (
            SELECT *
            FROM products.v_kit_extended_customer(_cg_id, true)
            WHERE (_category_id is null or category_id = _category_id) AND
                (_net_commercial_profile_id is null OR EXISTS(
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM json_array_elements(custom_fields) AS elem
                    WHERE elem->>'key_name' = 'commercial_profile_id'
                      AND (elem->'value'->>'id')::bigint = ANY(_net_commercial_profile_id)
                )) AND
                -- only if flag is true apply filter, (filter = false) != (ecommerce = false)
                (_only_ecommerce IS NULL OR _only_ecommerce IS FALSE OR ecommerce = true)
        ) x;
END;
$function$

functions.name: new_kit
new_kit_product
related_product_get_by_kit_id
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.related_product_get_by_kit_id(_kit_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
SELECT json_agg(x)
FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullif(kp.group_name, ''), p.internal_name) AS group_name,
             kp.required                                          AS required,
             json_agg(
                     json_build_object(
                             'name', p.internal_name,
                             'id', p.code,
                             'min_qty', kp.minimum,
                             'max_qty', kp.maximum,
                             'price', json_build_object('nrc', kp.nrc, 'mrc', kp.mrc),
                             'translation', common.get_translations(p.translation_uuid),
                             'image_url', p.img_url,
                             'custom_fields', products.get_product_custom_fields(p.code)
                     )
             ) AS products
      FROM products.kit_product kp
               JOIN products.product p on kp.product_code = p.code
      WHERE kp.kit_id = _kit_id
      GROUP by 1, 2
     ) x;
$function$

functions.name: related_product_get_by_kit_id_discount
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.related_product_get_by_kit_id_discount(search_kit bigint, _adjustment_nrc numeric DEFAULT 0.00, _adjustment_mrc numeric DEFAULT 0.00, _integer_rounding_nrc boolean DEFAULT false, _integer_rounding_mrc boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT json_agg(x)
    FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullif(kp.group_name, ''), p.internal_name) AS group_name,
                 kp.required                                          AS required,
                 json_agg(
                         json_build_object(
                                 'name', p.internal_name,
                                 'id', p.code,
                                 'min_qty', kp.minimum,
                                 'max_qty', kp.maximum,
                                 'price', json_build_object(
                                         'nrc', CASE WHEN _integer_rounding_nrc THEN ROUND((kp.nrc)::numeric * _adjustment_nrc) ELSE (kp.nrc)::numeric * _adjustment_nrc END,
                                         'mrc', CASE WHEN _integer_rounding_mrc THEN ROUND((kp.mrc)::numeric * _adjustment_mrc) ELSE (kp.mrc)::numeric * _adjustment_mrc END
                                    ),
                                 'translation', common.get_translations(p.translation_uuid),
                                 'image_url', p.img_url,
                                 'custom_fields', products.get_product_custom_fields(p.code)
                         )
                 ) AS products
          FROM products.kit_product kp
                   JOIN products.product p on kp.product_code = p.code
          WHERE kp.kit_id = search_kit
          GROUP by 1, 2
    ) x;
$function$

functions.name: upd_kit
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.upd_kit(p_kit_id integer, json_data json)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
    v_updated                    bool;
    v_group_id                   int;
begin

    update products.kit set internal_name = json_data ->> 'f_internal_name',
                           main_product_code = json_data ->> 's_main_product',
                           initial_subscription_months = (json_data ->> 'f_initial_subscription')::smallint,
                           next_subscription_months = (json_data ->> 'f_next_period')::smallint,
                           activation_time_days = (json_data ->> 'f_activation_time')::integer,
                           nrc = (json_data ->> 'f_nrc')::float8,
                           mrc = (json_data ->> 'f_mrc')::float8,
                           bundle_prefix = json_data ->> 'f_bundle_prefix',
                           ecommerce = (json_data ->> 'sw_ecommerce')::bool,
                           category_id = (json_data ->> 's_category')::integer,
                           is_main_prd_sellable = (json_data ->> 'sw_main_sellable')::bool,
                           is_active = (json_data ->> 'sw_active')::bool,
                           sconto_massimo = (json_data ->> 'f_sconto_massimo')::float4,
                           billing_period = (json_data ->> 'sl_billing_period')::integer,
                           variable_billing = (json_data ->> 'sw_variable_billing')::bool,
                           sla_resolution_hours = (json_data ->> 'f_sla_resolution_hours')::INTEGER,
                           h24_assurance = (json_data ->> 'sw_h24_assurance')::bool,
                           notes = (json_data ->> 'f_notes')::TEXT
    where id = p_kit_id;
    v_updated := FOUND;

    -- kit customer group
    delete from products.kit_customer_group where kit_id = p_kit_id;
    for v_group_id in select json_array_elements( json_data -> 'ms_sellable_to')
        loop
            insert into products.kit_customer_group ( kit_id, group_id , sellable)
            values ( p_kit_id, v_group_id , true);
        end loop;

    return v_updated;
end;

$function$

functions.name: upd_kit_product
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.upd_kit_product(p_id bigint, json_data json)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
    v_updated                    bool;
begin

    update products.kit_product set
        product_code = json_data ->> 'product_code',
        minimum = (json_data ->> 'minimum')::smallint,
        maximum = (json_data ->> 'maximum')::smallint,
        required = (json_data ->> 'required')::bool,
        nrc = (json_data ->> 'nrc')::numeric,
        mrc = (json_data ->> 'mrc')::numeric,
        position = (json_data ->> 'position')::smallint,
        group_name = json_data ->> 'group_name',
        notes = json_data ->> 'notes'
    where id = p_id;
    v_updated := FOUND;


    return v_updated;
end;

$function$

functions.name: v_kit_extended_customer
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION products.v_kit_extended_customer(_customer_group_ids bigint[], _only_ecommerce boolean DEFAULT false)
 RETURNS TABLE(id bigint, internal_name character varying, main_product_code character varying, is_main_prd_sellable boolean, is_active boolean, translation json, initial_subscription_months integer, next_subscription_months integer, activation_time_days integer, billing_period integer, base_price json, category character varying, category_id bigint, related_products json, sellable_to_customer_groups json, custom_fields json, bundle_prefix character varying, ecommerce boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN


    RETURN QUERY(
        SELECT DISTINCT ON (k.id)
            k.id,
            k.internal_name,
            k.main_product_code,
            k.is_main_prd_sellable,
            k.is_active,
            common.get_translations(k.translation_uuid) AS translation,
            (k.initial_subscription_months)::INT,
            (k.next_subscription_months)::INT,
            (k.activation_time_days)::INT,
            (k.billing_period)::INT,
            json_build_object(
                    'nrc', CASE WHEN kcg_nrc.use_int_rounding THEN ROUND((k.nrc)::numeric * (kcg_nrc.discount_nrc + 1)) ELSE (k.nrc)::numeric * (kcg_nrc.discount_nrc + 1) END,
                    'mrc', CASE WHEN kcg_mrc.use_int_rounding THEN ROUND((k.mrc)::numeric * (kcg_mrc.discount_mrc + 1)) ELSE (k.mrc)::numeric * (kcg_mrc.discount_mrc + 1) END
            ) AS base_price,
            pc.name AS category,
            (pc.id)::bigint AS category_id,
            products.related_product_get_by_kit_id_discount(k.id, (kcg_nrc.discount_nrc + 1), (kcg_mrc.discount_mrc + 1), kcg_nrc.use_int_rounding, kcg_mrc.use_int_rounding) AS related_products,
            products.get_kit_customer_group(k.id, true) AS sellable_to_customer_groups,
            products.get_kit_custom_fields(k.id) AS custom_fields,
            k.bundle_prefix,
            k.ecommerce
        FROM products.kit k
                INNER JOIN products.product_category pc ON pc.id = k.category_id
                INNER JOIN products.kit_customer_group kcg_nrc ON k.id = kcg_nrc.kit_id
                INNER JOIN products.kit_customer_group kcg_mrc ON k.id = kcg_mrc.kit_id
        WHERE
            -- compute values for discounts
            kcg_nrc.sellable = true AND
            kcg_nrc.group_id = (SELECT group_id_nrc FROM products.discount_get_for_kit(k.id, _customer_group_ids)) AND

            kcg_mrc.sellable = true AND
            kcg_mrc.group_id = (SELECT group_id_mrc FROM products.discount_get_for_kit(k.id, _customer_group_ids)) AND

            -- only if flag is true apply filter, (filter = false) != (ecommerce = false)
            (_only_ecommerce IS NULL OR _only_ecommerce IS FALSE OR k.ecommerce = true)
        ORDER BY
            k.id
    );
END;
$function$

functions.name: validate_discount_kit_customer_group
